name: skills
description: A monorepo of independently installable Claude Code skills, each packaged as its own plugin.

plugins.name: commit-and-push
plugins.description: Safely commit a completed logical chunk of work and push it to the remote branch.

plugins.name: hitl-pr-review-walkthrough
plugins.description: Create a reviewer walkthrough for human-in-the-loop pull request testing and merge decisions.

plugins.name: pipe-down
plugins.description: Run exactly one shell command per Bash call so commands match Claude Code's permission allowlist and run without re-prompting.
